title: Paper accepted at ECCV 2026
description: Xu et al.’s paper “ShellMaker: Language-Guided Exterior Completion under Structural Constraints” was accepted at ECCV 2026.

title: Summer 2026: Arsh Gupta and Connor Hayden join the lab
description: Arsh Gupta and Connor Hayden joined the lab to work on quantum computing for computer vision.

title: Summer 2026: Rami Hage joins the lab
description: Rami Hage joined the lab to work on GPU optimization for preventive motion blur processing.

title: Daniel Aliaga promoted to Full Professor
description: Prof. Daniel Aliaga was promoted to Full Professor of Computer Science, effective August 2026.

title: Paper published in npj Urban Sustainability
description: He et al.’s “AI-based Urban Layout Foundation Model” was published in npj Urban Sustainability (Nature Portfolio).

title: Cover article published in Communications of the ACM
description: Adnan Firoze et al.’s “Where Are the City Trees? Monitoring Urban Trees across the U.S. Using Generative AI” was published in CACM (Vol. 69, Issue 4) and featured as the cover article.

title: Paper published at WACV 2026
description: He et al.’s paper “Advancing Multimodal LLMs by Large-Scale 3D Visual Instruction Dataset Generation” was published at WACV 2026.

title: URBX Lab website launched
description: We are excited to announce the launch of the URBX Lab (Urban + X) website.

title: $2.5M NSF grant awarded (FIRE-WUI)
description: Prof. Daniel Aliaga, as co-PI, received a $2.5M NSF grant, “FIRE-WUI: Community Resilience Assessment Framework for Wildfires using Multi-Resolution Digital Twins.”

title: Daniel Aliaga receives Seed for Success Award
description: Prof. Daniel Aliaga received Purdue’s Seed for Success Award.

title: Paper published at AAAI 2026
description: Adnan Firoze et al.’s paper “Building Instance Segmentation for Dense Urban Settlements” was published at AAAI 2026.
